title: Damage = Jump higher
description: This mod let's you jump higher if you get damaged.
body:
This mod increases the player’s jump height every time they take damage. Each hit raises the jump boost permanently, allowing players to jump higher with each successive hit. The boost level never decreases and can reach up to level 100. The effect is server-side, ensuring compatibility in both singleplayer and multiplayer worlds.

**Key Features:**

-Boost jump height every time the player takes damage.

-Permanent jump boost effect that never decreases.

-Boost levels up to 100.

-Fully server-side: works in singleplayer and on multiplayer servers.


btw this is my first minecraft mod a every made and I learned/did all this in one day.
